name: Game Of Puzzles: Space
short_description: Game Of Puzzles: Space - is a simple puzzle on a space theme.
detailed_description:
Game Of Puzzles: Space - is a game in which you have to rotate puzzle pieces to solve a puzzle.
Features:
  • 50 levels
  • Suitable for all ages
  • Simple mouse control
  • A range of sizes from 16 to 36 pieces
  • Simple and understandable gameplay
  • Steam Achievements
Credits: This game was created using Clickteam Fusion 2.5! Music by Erwarda Savitnaag.
